topStories.title: Quote of the day: Donald Trump on mental toughness—‘What separates the winners from the losers is how a person reacts…’
topStories.description: Donald Trump highlights that success depends on how we respond to setbacks. His quote stresses resilience, adaptability, and mindset. Challenges are inevitable, but winners grow from them, using obstacles as opportunities to adjust, learn, and move forward stronger.

dailyNews.title: ‘Had enough’: American woman quits Sweden after 8 years, cites work and visa challenges in viral post
dailyNews.description: An American entrepreneur has announced her decision to leave Sweden after nearly a decade, citing career challenges, immigration hurdles and growing concerns about how foreign professionals are treated.

dailyNews.title: Maine Democrat Graham Platner apologizes for using 'R-word' in interview on tattoo scandal
dailyNews.description: Democratic Maine U.S. Senate candidate Graham Platner apologized for using the R-word in a recent interview where he addressed his tattoo controversy.

dailyNews.title: Man, woman killed in rip current as lifeguard shortage leaves danger zones in beach destination

dailyNews.title: SEN TIM SHEEHY: Gold Star families deserve justice. This $15B from Iran is a start
dailyNews.description: Terrorism victims led by 1st Lt. Jacob Fritz's mother seek billions in Iranian Bitcoin, facing opposition from a U.S. attorney in New York federal court.

dailyNews.title: AJ Styles' TNA colleagues credit WWE star for paving way to company ahead of Hall of Fame induction
dailyNews.description: Alex Shelley and Chris Sabin credit AJ Styles with paving the way for their WWE careers ahead of his Hall of Fame induction ceremony on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Is Mark Zuckerberg's Meta AI getting too smart?
dailyNews.description: Meta's new Muse Spark AI model powers multimodal image recognition, parallel task handling and a dedicated shopping mode across its apps and AI glasses.

dailyNews.title: Air Force is 'smallest,' 'least ready' in history, National Guard leaders warn Congress in fighter jet plea
dailyNews.description: Air National Guard generals request between 72 and 100 new fighter jets, warning the Air Force faces its worst readiness in its 78-year history.
